reasoning: A Minecraft Movie opened to a massive $162.8 million over its 3-day domestic opening weekend in April 2025, setting an extremely high bar for the highest opening weekend of the year. 'Wicked: For Good' is currently tracking to open well below this mark, with industry estimates generally projecting a $112 million to $155 million 3-day opening weekend context. Given that these projections fall comfortably short of the $162.8 million threshold established by 'A Minecraft Movie', the probability of 'Wicked: For Good' beating it to have the very highest opening of 2025 is very low.
